title: brain index status — --json success output
description: Read-only retrieval-index status. Reports the configured indexing generation identity (chunkerVersion/embeddingModel/embeddingDimensions per D4/D7), per-note active-generation coverage, and staleness — the set of notes whose active generation's generationId differs from the generationId recomputed from the current note + config (retrieval-index-contract.md §4). Reports staleness as data — it writes no ledger row and never mutates the index — but, like every executed index operation (plan Task 3.5), it appends exactly one terminal run.projection git-ref audit event.

configured.description: False when no LanceDB directory is configured/present (index checks report not-configured, not failed).

chunkCount.description: Live SearchChunk rows across all generations (0 when unconfigured).

generation.description: The current indexing generation-identity components (§2) derived from config.

indexed.description: Notes with a current, active generation and live chunks.

stale.description: Notes whose active generation is stale (§4).

missing.description: Notes with no active generation / no live chunks.

staleness.description: Per-note staleness detail; empty when the index is fully current.

triggers.description: Which generation-identity drifts (§4) make this note stale.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Read-only index status: current generation identity, per-note coverage, and staleness (§4); emits exactly one terminal run.projection audit event.
sideEffects: emits exactly one run.projection git-ref audit event (executed index operation, plan Task 3.5)
prohibitedEffects: no more than one terminal run.projection event per run

errorCodes.when: the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
